title: Extension.js Agent Bridge — Action Audit Record
description: One audit line per command issued over the control channel, written one-per-line to dist/extension-js/<browser>/actions.ndjson. Satisfies the lockstep invariant 'anything an agent DOES is also a file', giving the no-MCP human a trustable record of what an agent did to their extension. Eval source is hashed by default; full source only under author-mode. Same rotation policy as logs.ndjson.

cmdId.description: Correlates with the control-envelope command/result pair.

principal.description: Who issued it: cli | mcp | a controller token id. Never the raw token.

exprHash.description: FNV-1a hash of the eval expression (redact-safe default). Present for op=eval.

expr.description: Raw eval source. ONLY written under author-mode; omitted otherwise.
